description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent, colorful marquee at the top displaying the 'Final Fight' logo and dynamic character artwork. The front panel includes a large screen set into a black bezel, flanked by vibrant side art and a control panel with joysticks and buttons. The control panel is decorated with a thematic graphic and is slightly angled for ergonomic play. The side panels are mostly black but feature large, hexagonal decals with character illustrations and the game's branding. The lower front section houses a coin slot mechanism, typical of arcade machines, and the cabinet is trimmed with a subtle gold outline. The overall build appears sturdy, constructed primarily from wood or MDF with plastic and metal components for the controls and screen.
description: A classic upright 'Final Fight' arcade game cabinet with vibrant marquee artwork, side decals, and a control panel featuring joysticks and buttons. The cabinet is mostly black with gold trim and a coin slot on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marquee, screen, control panel with joysticks and buttons, and the coin slot at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large side decal with character artwork and the angled control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid black back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, featuring the same large side decal and the control panel's profile.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a black bezel surrounding the screen.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple round buttons arranged side-by-side for two-player gameplay, with a black background and thematic artwork.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Final Fight' logo in bold red and yellow, with dynamic character illustrations and a vibrant, action-themed background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, hexagonal decals with colorful character artwork and the 'Final Fight' branding on both side panels.
